sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98050" key="suvoiki/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συϝοικία</orth>, <sense id="n98050.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συνοικία</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συζάω</orth>, only in form <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συζῶ</foreign> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
